overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city environment. The journey progresses from sunlit streets through commercial plazas with food vendors, up to elevated walkways with panoramic city views, and down into darker alleyways, showcasing dense urban architecture with neon signage and industrial megastructures.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with green residential buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the asphalt street past green apartment buildings and metal dumpsters

entered.detail: tall green concrete residential building with multiple windows
paved street surface with yellow and red curb markings
industrial metal railing along the right side of the street
tall futuristic skyscraper with orange and teal facade visible in the distance
green metal trash containers against the building wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit urban street with a green apartment building on the left and industrial fencing on the right. The camera moves forward along the asphalt road, passing dumpsters and approaching a narrow alley entrance. The atmosphere is bright and clear with strong shadows cast by the midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with red building and food stalls

events.description: turns into open plaza area with red commercial building and food vendor stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the commercial plaza passing food stalls and browsing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind a food stall with red and white signage
pedestrian in pink clothing walking ahead through the plaza

entered.detail: distinctive red art-deco style building with curved roof overhang
wooden vendor stalls with red and white striped awnings
large illuminated billboards and posters on the building walls
open paved pedestrian area with patterned concrete tiles
red and white striped concrete seating blocks

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a sunlit commercial plaza dominated by a striking red building with food vendor stalls. Pedestrians browse the stalls and walk through the open concrete area. Large advertising posters adorn the walls, and the camera moves steadily through the space passing benches and market stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with ascending concrete stairs

events.description: enters narrow alleyway between buildings with concrete stairs leading upward
begins ascending the concrete stairway between tall building walls

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs through the narrow passage between green and concrete buildings

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading upward between building walls
teal-colored elevated walkway structure spanning overhead
illuminated cyan arrow sign pointing right
green and yellow storefront signage for a pawn shop
tall concrete and metal walls of the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a narrow enclosed alleyway with tall walls on both sides. The camera ascends a concrete stairway toward a green overhead bridge structure. Neon signage becomes visible on the right, and the lighting becomes more shadowed as the path narrows between the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with panoramic city views

events.description: emerges onto elevated walkway with open sky and expansive city views
panoramic view of megatowers and monorail tracks becomes visible as camera turns

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated pathway overlooking the dense cyberpunk cityscape

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near railing looking out at the city view

entered.detail: wide elevated pedestrian path with metal railings overlooking the city
elevated train track structure running between buildings
massive futuristic skyscraper with orange and teal paneling and the number 02
metal framework and walkways attached to industrial buildings
tables and chairs under a blue umbrella on a lower terrace

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a breathtaking elevated walkway with full sky visibility and panoramic views of the cyberpunk city. Massive megatowers rise in the distance alongside monorail tracks. The camera moves along the concrete pathway past industrial scaffolding and outdoor seating areas, with the dense urban architecture sprawling below.

events.description: enters dark enclosed stairwell descending between concrete walls
lighting becomes significantly darker as the descent continues into the lower level

agents.ego_description: descending the dark concrete stairs into a lower alleyway with graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: steep concrete staircase leading downward into darkness
concrete walls covered with white and red graffiti tags
multi-level concrete parking structure with open levels
scattered garbage bags and debris along the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a dark, enclosed stairwell descending between graffiti-covered concrete walls. The lighting drops significantly as the camera moves downward, revealing a dilapidated lower alley with trash debris and a view of a parking garage structure ahead. The atmosphere shifts from bright and open to shadowy and confined.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that travels from bright, sunlit city streets up to a panoramic skyline before descending into a dark, subterranean alley. It begins on a sun-drenched asphalt road flanked by a green apartment building and industrial fencing, moving forward past dumpsters toward a narrow entrance. As the camera enters a commercial plaza, the environment opens into a concrete space dominated by a striking red building and bustling food vendor stalls under the midday sun. The scene then shifts into a shadowed alleyway, ascending a concrete stairway past neon signage toward a green overhead bridge that reveals a breathtaking elevated walkway with views of massive megatowers and monorail tracks. Finally, the perspective transitions from the open sky into a dark, enclosed stairwell, descending past graffiti-covered walls into a dilapidated lower alley filled with debris.
